instructions: Baton is a setup-free Go CLI for explicitly enrolled GitHub issue Tasks. Review Task classification, deterministic selection, prefix-safe dry-run/apply parity, typed bounded GitHub requests, explicit errors, JSON/text contract consistency, and preservation of issue bodies and project labels. Flag any return of config, setup, policy workflow, branch, PR, CI/review/merge, delivery, candidate/recommendation/run, or legacy output behavior.

files.description: Implementation, safety, release, and validation rules.
